strategy: Storm boss (5,390). He takes +20% from Myth and resists Storm 40%. Hit with Myth or a non-Storm school.

Round 1 his Gold Dragon casts a Shadow Sentinel on itself (75% intercept, -30% incoming, critical block), so early hits get intercepted by the dragon. Clear the Sentinel or dragon first, or wait it out before committing your big hit on the Sultan.
Blade up while the Sentinel is active, then land a Myth attack once you can reach the Sultan cleanly.
cheatNotes: The Gold Dragon shields itself with a Shadow Sentinel (75% intercept) on Round 1, so your hits get soaked by the dragon. Blade during that window and hit the Sultan once the intercept is gone.
